name: Job Market Trust Infrastructure Model
author: Market Catalyst - Job Market
description: Job Market Trust Infrastructure: structured hiring transparency, promises, reviews, and verification.

entities.name: personal_vouch
entities.brief: Job market specific vouch extending core vouch concept
entities.description:
Extends the core vouch entity with job market specific fields. A personal vouch
for a job posting represents a conditional transfer of reputation where someone
goes on record stating they believe a job posting represents a real opportunity.
This implements the Trust Chain concept from the core vouch model, with job-market
specific relationship context.

fields.name: vouch_id
fields.description: Unique vouch identifier (matches core vouch.vouch_id if linked)

fields.name: job_posting_id
fields.description: Reference to the job posting being vouched for (subject_id in core vouch)

fields.name: core_vouch_id
fields.description: Optional reference to core vouch entity for reputation weighting and revocation

fields.name: source_identity
fields.description: GitHub UID or Public Key of the voucher (from core vouch concept)

fields.name: claim_type
fields.description: What specifically is being vouched for (from core vouch: EXISTENCE, INTEGRITY, TERMS)

fields.name: evidence_link
fields.description: Reference to a commit, file, or external proof that supports the claim (from core vouch)

fields.name: source_seniority
fields.description: Computed age of the source account in days (e.g., GitHub account age). Used for reputation weighting.

fields.name: source_activity_index
fields.description: Historical 'Proof of Work' metric (e.g., commits/contributions count). Used for reputation weighting.

fields.name: vouch_weight
fields.description: The final 'force' this vouch applies to the Market Gravity. Computed from source reputation metrics.

fields.name: valid_from
fields.description: Date from which the vouch is valid (YYYY-MM-DD). Ensures vouches don't stay 'green' if market conditions change.

fields.name: valid_until
fields.description: Date until which the vouch is valid (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional expiration date for time-based validity.

fields.name: revocation_digest
fields.description: If the voucher discovers the 'Originator' lied, they can issue a 'Revocation' which is appended to the ledger, immediately flipping the go_nogo_signal. This is a cryptographic digest/hash of the revocation.

fields.name: revoked_date
fields.description: Date when the vouch was revoked (YYYY-MM-DD), if applicable

fields.name: voucher_relationship
fields.description: Job market specific: Relationship of the voucher to the company/position

fields.name: confidence_level
fields.description: Job market specific: Confidence level (1-5) of the voucher in the legitimacy of the posting

fields.name: vouch_statement
fields.description: Optional statement from the voucher explaining why they believe this is a real opportunity

fields.name: is_verified
fields.description: Whether the vouch has been verified (e.g., through cross-referencing or evidence)

fields.name: verification_notes
fields.description: Notes about verification of the vouch
